projects.name: Config Transport & Content Transport
projects.problemStatement: Organizations needed reliable configuration migration across environments with minimal downtime.
projects.myRole: Frontend and BFF developer responsible for building migration workflows and ensuring reliable configuration transport systems.
whatIDid: Led FE and BFF development for configuration migration workflows
Built APIs for secure and reliable data transfer
Ensured minimal downtime during deployments
Participated in architecture and system design discussions
Migrated projects to MUI v5 and fixed accessibility issues
Automated testing workflows using MABL
projects.impact: Enabled seamless configuration migrations with improved reliability, accessibility, and reduced deployment issues.
technicalDecisions: Avoided complex full rollback implementation for partially completed migrations to reduce operational risk
Implemented controlled failure handling where transport operations stop immediately upon failure
Preserved successfully transported configurations while leaving remaining configurations unchanged to maintain predictable system state
challenges: Designing reliable configuration transport workflows across environments while handling partial migration failures
Evaluating rollback strategies for long-running configuration transport operations
Maintaining system consistency when transport processes fail mid-execution

technicalDecisions: Improved cross-team collaboration through structured discussions, reusable documentation, and component standardization
Used Storybook to create shared visibility and consistency across UI components for distributed teams
Focused on iterative delivery and adaptable workflows to accommodate evolving stakeholder feedback

projects.name: Learniverse AI
projects.problemStatement: Learners need adaptive, personalized learning platforms that dynamically generate learning paths, quizzes, and AI-driven feedback instead of static course content.
projects.myRole: Full-stack developer responsible for designing and building the SPA, backend APIs, adaptive AI workflows, and learning experience.
whatIDid: Built a responsive AI-powered learning SPA using React.js and MUI
Developed backend APIs for course generation, quizzes, feedback, and progress tracking
Implemented learner-based multi-course architecture using learner_id and course_id
Created adaptive AI-generated learning modules and quizzes
Built AI-powered feedback and progress analysis system
Designed modern glassmorphism-inspired UI/UX with loaders, modals, and analytics dashboards
Integrated progress insights including strengths, weak areas, trends, and recommendations
Implemented course management flows including authentication, course selection, and generation
Configured deployment for GitHub Pages
projects.impact: Created an end-to-end AI-powered adaptive learning platform with personalized course generation, intelligent assessments, and learner progress insights.

architecture.aiLayer: OpenAI-powered adaptive content and quiz generation

technicalDecisions: Focused on building a stable MVP with complete user flows instead of shipping incomplete experimental features
Prioritized reusable backend APIs and modular frontend architecture for future extensibility
Implemented learner_id and course_id based architecture to support scalable multi-course learning experiences
challenges: Balancing multiple evolving product ideas while maintaining focus on delivering a complete and functional platform
Avoiding partially implemented AI features by prioritizing end-to-end usable workflows
Designing adaptive learning experiences while keeping the system maintainable and scalable

projects.name: AskAkanksha AI

whatIDid: Designed conversational AI interface for portfolio exploration
Structured resume and project data for LLM-based interactions
Built interactive Q&A experience for users
Applied prompt engineering techniques like context grounding and role definition
Improved response accuracy using structured prompts
projects.impact: Transformed static portfolio into an AI-powered interactive experience for natural language exploration.
technicalDecisions: Implemented structured prompt engineering with strict JSON response contracts
Designed frontend-friendly conversational message blocks instead of tightly coupled UI schemas
Separated intent handling from rendering logic to improve scalability and maintainability
challenges: Ensuring consistent structured JSON responses from LLM outputs
Handling unpredictable AI-generated response formats for stable frontend rendering
Designing reusable message-block response schemas for scalable SPA integration
